mapping_description: This mapping is to load data from Work table to 3NF table.

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.BK_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_NUM_INT, 
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.BK_SS_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_EXCHNG_RT_EFFCTV_DTM,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_MERCHANT_NAME,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_VAT_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_EXCHANGE_RT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_CREATION_DTM,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_CRT_WRKR_EMP_PRTY_KEY,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_UPD_WRKR_EMP_PRTY_KEY,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TYPE_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_FREE_MEAL_CNT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_BREAKFAST_INCLUDED_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_LOCATION_DESCR,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_AMT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_EXPENSE_INCURRED_DTM,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_ITEM_DESCR,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_JUSTIFICATION_TXT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_ATTENDEE_CNT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_SHORT_PAYMENT_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_RECEIPT_TRXL_AMT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.SK_REPORT_LINE_ID_INT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EXPENSE_REPORT_KEY,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_CATEGORY_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_DAILY_MONEY_AMT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ER_LINE_TYPE    ,              
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.RU_SMRY_EXPENSE_REPORT_LN_KEY ,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.BK_EXPENSE_LN_SVC_PRVDR_NAME,  
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EMP_RECOG_ROLE,                
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_ROLE,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.RU_REWARDED_EMP_CNT,     
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.RU_MERCHANT_SIC_CD,            
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.RU_BK_EMP_RECOG_REWARD_TYPE_CD ,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.GIFT_OR_ENTERTAINMENT_ID,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EXPENSE_END_DTM,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.DV_EXPENSE_END_DT,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.ACTIVITY_TYPE_DESCR,
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.PENDING_YOUR_RESOLUTION_LN_CD
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE 
WHERE
N_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY = 
W_EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY)
